Good morning, Emma. Right now, I am updating the Impact checklist for two farms.
Great. Is the team organizing the farm documents?
Yes. My team is organizing the documents, and I am training a new colleague.
Are you visiting any farms this week?
No, I am not visiting farms today. I am working from the office and monitoring the data.
Perfect. And when are you planning the next visit?
On Friday. Today we are preparing the schedule and planning the route.

Let me tell you what I am doing this week. Right now, I am updating the Impact checklist for two coffee farms. At the moment, my team is organizing the farm documents for the next audit. I am also preparing a short report for the office in Geneva. This week is very busy. I am monitoring the sustainability data every day, and I am training a new colleague. She is learning the checklist with me. On Friday, we are planning the next field visit. So, right now, I am not visiting farms. I am working from the office in Varginha.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma from Geneva. I am calling about this week. I know you are very busy. Right now, the team here is reviewing your last report, and I am preparing the questions for the audit. Are you updating the checklist for the two farms? And is your colleague learning the process well? Please send me a short message today. Tell me what you are working on right now and what the team is doing this week. Thank you, Carlos. Talk soon.

Right now, Carlos is working from the office. At the moment, he is updating the Impact checklist. His team is organizing the farm documents. He is also training a new colleague this week. On Friday, they are planning the next field visit.
